FIX Bible Generic Patch Notes

v4.6.3-generic (2026-03-29)
- Removed all venue-specific tag descriptions; tag descriptions are now sourced exclusively from the bundled FIXimate dictionary.
- Removed Proprietary extension filter button from the legend.

v4.6.2-generic (2026-03-14)
- Added standard FIX enum/sub-value integration to decoded row details, using the bundled FIX 4.4 dictionary for allowed values and meanings.
- Multi-value tags such as ExecInst, QuoteCondition, TradeCondition, OrderRestrictions, and Scope now split and validate individual sub-values instead of treating the full field as one opaque value.
- Uploaded XML dictionaries now preserve enum value sets when they define them, and standard FIX tags can still fall back to bundled enum metadata when they do not.

v4.6.1-generic (2026-03-09)
- Added a draggable vertical resize grip to the Decoded Fields panel so users can expand or shrink that module without toggling full-panel Expand.
- Manual decoded panel height now persists during normal re-renders/layout sync, with keyboard resize support and quick reset (Escape or double-click grip).

v4.6.0-generic (2026-03-07)
- Added LZ4 frame decompression: "Load file" button accepts .lz4 compressed FIX logs and auto-detects compression before parsing.
- Added "All (N)" tab in multi-message view: selects all messages simultaneously, highlights all message ranges in the input block, and enables aggregate summary.
- Selecting an individual message tab from the "All" view now deselects aggregate summary automatically.
- Moved "Load file" button to the left of "Copy" in the input toolbar.

v4.5.0-generic (2026-02-22)
- Standard FIX 4.4 tag definitions and data types now use a pinned FIXimate snapshot in the generic/default decoding path.
- Standard FIX 4.4 tags now show source as FIX44 (FIXimate) in decoded output.
- Removed STP/MDP validation profiles; required-tag validation now uses generic FIX 4.4 rules (or uploaded dictionary profile).
- Uploaded dictionary mode now falls back to FIXimate for missing standard tag definitions and data types.

v4.5.0-generic (2026-02-21)
- Added a vendor-neutral FIX Bible variant.
- Removed vendor-specific branding and references from source-facing UI text and embedded schema text.
- Renamed non-standard kind labeling to Proprietary extension.
- Renamed schema directional field usage to sent_by_venue.
- Hid the FIXTESTER conversion button behind a disabled feature flag while keeping converter code in place.
- Added parallel generic distribution artifacts (HTML, README, patch notes, ZIP).
